title: verilator does not detect dimension mismatch error
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 798 from https://www.veripool.org



---

RTL:

```
    logic[39:0]   ready_addr[1:0];
    logic[39:0]   ready_to_issue_addr;

...
    always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
...
        ready_to_issue_addr <= ready_addr;
...
    end

```

VCS errors:

```
Error-[IUDA] Incompatible dimensions
..., 1249
  Incompatible unpacked dimensions in assignment
  Arrays with incompatible unpacked dimensions  cannot be used in assignments,
  initializations and instantiations.


Error-[ICTA] Incompatible complex type
..., 1249
  Incompatible complex type assignment
  Type of source expression is incompatible with type of target expression. 
  Mismatching types cannot be used in assignments, initializations and 
  instantiations. The type of the target is 'logic[39:0]', while the type of 
  the source is 'logic[39:0]$[1:0]'.
  Source Expression: ready_addr

```
